message:
fix: Lance v2 nullable columns, column validation, cursor batching, BigInt export

- Rewrite Lance v2 parser to handle nullable columns with 64-byte aligned
  bitmap+data layout (all row slots stored, null bitmap as mask)
- Add column validation in dataset queries (filter, projection, sort)
- Fix cursor to respect batchSize via row-level chunking
- Export bigIntReplacer from both entry points for JSON serialization
- Fix CLAUDE.md API examples to match actual filter(col, op, val) syntax
- Add dataOffsetInPage to PageInfo for Lance v2 alignment padding
- Copy WASM binary in build:ts script

files.patch:
@@ -18,9 +18,9 @@
   "scripts": {
     "dev": "wrangler dev",
     "prepublishOnly": "pnpm run build",
-    "build": "pnpm run build:wasm && tsc",
+    "build": "pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:ts",
     "build:wasm": "cd wasm && zig build wasm && mkdir -p ../src/wasm && cp zig-out/bin/querymode.wasm ../src/wasm/",
-    "build:ts": "tsc",
+    "build:ts": "tsc && mkdir -p dist/wasm && cp src/wasm/querymode.wasm dist/wasm/",
     "test": "vitest run",
     "test:watch": "vitest",
     "deploy": "pnpm run build && wrangler deploy",

  *     .sort("age", "desc")
  *     .limit(100)
